name: Rhubarb Pork Chop Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Sliced fresh or frozen rhubarb, 1 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown pork chops in oil and season with salt and pepper. Remove to a warm platter.
2. Mix 1/2 cup pan drippings with bread crumbs. Reserve the remaining 1/2 cup.
3. Sprinkle reserved bread crumbs into a 13-inch x 9-inch x 2-inch baking dish.
4. Combine rhubarb, sugar, flour, and cinnamon; spoon half over the bread crumbs.
5. Arrange pork chops on top. Spoon remaining rhubarb mixture over chops.
6. Cover with foil and bake at 350 degrees for 30-45 minutes.
7. Remove foil. Sprinkle with reserved bread crumbs.
8. Bake an additional 10-15 minutes or until chops test done. Yield: 4 servings.
